products.title: Skin Filter Serum

products.title: First Milk
products.description: Our first scent memory the soft embrace of early connection. First Milk is a delicate, comforting fragrance that blends almond milk , tonka bean , french vanilla and iris with a hint of pink pepper . It dries down to a cocoon of amber and cypriol , creating a warm, skin-close scent that melts effortlessly into the skin.

products.title: Barrier Culture Moisturizer
products.description: Meet your skincare shield: BARRIER CULTURE MOISTURIZER. A lightweight pre-, pro- and postbiotic formula with ceramides, peptides, niacinamide and squalane that’s engineered to protect the skin barrier, replenish the microbiome, lock in moisture and smooth skin texture. Supporting long-term skin health without overloading the complexion with too many active ingredients.

products.title: Supa Thick Shampoo
products.description: Supa_Thick Shampoo is a gently foaming, low pH formula designed to promote hair growth, improve density, and support your scalp microbiome. Free from silicones, parabens, SLS, and artificial fragrance, this science-powered shampoo deeply cleanses hair and scalp, removing buildup without stripping natural oils. products.title: Debloat+
products.description: Debloat+ calms chronic bloating, gas and discomfort fast with a proprietary blend of digestive enzymes, clinically studied actives and anti-inflammatory ingredients used for centuries in Ayurvedic medicine to treat gastrointestinal issues. Ideal for combatting IBS symptoms, and when used long term supports diversity of the gut microbiome through inhibiting growth of 'bad' bacteria.

products.title: Past Time
products.description: A memory you can’t place but can’t let go of. Past Time is an abstract, enveloping scent where amber resin meets smoky sweetness , balanced by coconut milk , rhubarb , sandalwood , and vetiver . A warm, nostalgic amber fragrance that feels deeply personal, familiar yet unforgettable.

products.title: Otherwhere
products.description: The now, shaped by everything before. The Now smells like skin but better . A modern, addictive blend of caramel , gentle oud , sandalwood , cardamom , and incense , this warm, skin-like fragrance feels familiar yet entirely new, a scent that’s both timeless and deeply personal.
